languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn smiles.{/n} "Perhaps. But it is what I truly believe. Only time, the most dispassionate arbiter of all, will be able to judge us."

languages.text: {n}Эоганн улыбается.{/n} "Возможно. Но это то, во что я искренне верю. Рассудить нас сможет лишь самый бесстрастный судья — время".
{n}Eogunn smiles.{/n} "Perhaps. But it is what I truly believe. Only time, the most dispassionate arbiter of all, will be able to judge us."
languages.original_text: {n}Эоганн улыбается.{/n} "Возможно. Но это то, во что я искренне верю. Рассудить нас сможет лишь самый бесстрастный судья — время".

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn smiles.{/n} "Perhaps. But it is what I truly believe. Only time, the most dispassionate arbiter of all, will be able to judge us."
{n}Eogunn smiles.{/n} "Perhaps. But it is what I truly believe. Only time, the most dispassionate arbiter of all, will be able to judge us."
{n}Eogunn smiles.{/n} "Perhaps. But it is what I truly believe. Only time, the most dispassionate arbiter of all, will be able to judge us."

languages.text: {n}エオガンは微笑む。{/n}「そうかもしれない。でも、それは私が本当に信じていることだ。私たちを判断できるのは、最も感情に左右されない裁き手である時間だけだ」
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn smiles.{/n} "Perhaps. But it is what I truly believe. Only time, the most dispassionate arbiter of all, will be able to judge us."

traits.locale_text: エオグンは微笑む。「そうかもしれない。でも、それは私が本当に信じていることだ。私たちを判断できるのは、最も感情に左右されない裁き手である時間だけだ。」

languages.text: {n}伊奥贡笑了笑。{/n}“也许吧。但这确是我由衷的信念。唯有时间，那最无情的仲裁者，才能评判我们。”
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn smiles.{/n} "Perhaps. But it is what I truly believe. Only time, the most dispassionate arbiter of all, will be able to judge us."

traits.locale_text: {n}伊奥贡笑了笑。{/n}“也许吧。但这确是我由衷的信念。唯有时间，那最无情的仲裁者，才能评判我们。”

languages.text: {n}Eogunn sourit.{/n} « Peut-être, mais c'est ce que je crois sincèrement. Seul le temps, l'arbitre le plus rationnel de tous, pourra nous juger. »
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn smiles.{/n} "Perhaps. But it is what I truly believe. Only time, the most dispassionate arbiter of all, will be able to judge us."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn sourit.{/n} « Peut-être, mais c'est ce que je crois sincèrement. Seul le temps, l'arbitre le plus rationnel de tous, pourra nous juger. »

languages.text: {n}Eogunn sonríe.{/n} «Tal vez, pero es lo que creo. Solo el tiempo, el juez más imparcial de cuantos existen, podrá juzgarnos».
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn smiles.{/n} "Perhaps. But it is what I truly believe. Only time, the most dispassionate arbiter of all, will be able to judge us."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn sonríe.{/n} «Tal vez, pero es lo que creo. Solo el tiempo, el juez más imparcial de cuantos existen, podrá juzgarnos».

languages.text: {n}Eogunn gülümsüyor.{/n} "Belki de. Fakat ben gerçekten buna inanıyorum. Bizi ancak tarafsız tek hakem olan zaman yargılayabilir."
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn smiles.{/n} "Perhaps. But it is what I truly believe. Only time, the most dispassionate arbiter of all, will be able to judge us."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn gülümsüyor.{/n} "Belki de. Fakat ben gerçekten buna inanıyorum. Bizi ancak tarafsız tek hakem olan zaman yargılayabilir."

languages.text: {n}Eogunn lächelt.{/n} "Vielleicht. Aber das glaube ich tatsächlich. Nur die Zeit, die objektivste Schlichterin von allen, kann über uns urteilen."
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn smiles.{/n} "Perhaps. But it is what I truly believe. Only time, the most dispassionate arbiter of all, will be able to judge us."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn lächelt.{/n} "Vielleicht. Aber das glaube ich tatsächlich. Nur die Zeit, die objektivste Schlichterin von allen, kann über uns urteilen."
